items.title: 💰 File Personal Taxes
items.body: Get your personal taxes done. Deadline is April 15.

items.title: 🧾 Get Tax Filing & Bank Statements for Jack (CPA)
items.body: Gather tax filing information and bank statements and get them over to Jack, your CPA.

items.title: 🦞 OpenClaw — Social Media Sharing Agents
items.body: Next priority for OpenClaw: get the social media sharing agents working. Goal is automated or one-tap sharing of content across platforms via agent workflows.

items.title: 🤖 Reyla — Paywall + PDF Brochure Generator
items.body:
Two things to tackle for Reyla:
1. Build the paywall
2. One-click PDF brochure generation — user clicks, gets a polished brochure PDF

items.title: 📱 TextOS — Paywall
items.body: Time to build the TextOS paywall. Monetization priority.

items.title: ✅ Write Greg's Recommendation
items.body: Don't forget to fill out the recommendation for Greg.

items.title: Chelsea's Anthropic courses — review when you have 45 mins
items.body:
Chelsea asked you to complete 4 Anthropic Skilljar courses for her partner certification. Links:

1. Introduction to Agent Skills → https://anthropic.skilljar.com/introduction-to-agent-skills
2. Claude with the Anthropic API → https://anthropic.skilljar.com/claude-with-the-anthropic-api
3. Introduction to Model Context Protocol → https://anthropic.skilljar.com/introduction-to-model-context-protocol
4. Claude Code in Action → https://anthropic.skilljar.com/claude-code-in-action

items.title: InkThorn Playbook is live!
items.body: Text notes to your Rob-Agent on Telegram and they'll appear here automatically. Your agents will also publish daily briefings to this panel.
